name: Keelvar Sourcing Optimization Platform API
what_it_does: AI-powered sourcing optimization platform with REST API — enabling procurement teams to run complex sourcing events (RFQ, RFP, auctions) with automated bid analysis, scenario modeling, award optimization using linear programming, and Sourcing Bots that automate routine RFQ negotiation without human intervention.
use_cases: Integrating Keelvar sourcing events with P2P platforms (SAP Ariba, Coupa) via API for data sync
Triggering Keelvar Sourcing Bots for automated supplier negotiation via API
Querying sourcing event analytics and award optimization results via Keelvar API
Managing supplier responses and bid data via Keelvar API for procurement workflow integration
Exporting award recommendations and sourcing event outcomes via API for ERP integration
not_for: Accounts payable and invoice processing (Keelvar is sourcing-only, not P2P)
Simple purchase orders and catalog buying (Keelvar focuses on competitive sourcing events)
Small business purchasing (Keelvar targets enterprise procurement with high-value categories)
best_when: A large procurement organization needs to optimize complex category sourcing with mathematical award optimization and Sourcing Bot automation — especially for transportation, logistics, and manufacturing categories where multi-variable optimization provides significant savings.
avoid_when: You have simple sourcing needs, low transaction volume, don't have a dedicated procurement team, or need full P2P coverage (Keelvar is sourcing-only).

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for system integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with sourcing module access. Webhook for sourcing event lifecycle notifications. REST API for sourcing event management. Integration with SAP Ariba and Coupa via certified connectors. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. Sourcing Bot configuration via API for automated negotiation workflows.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; contact sales; typically based on managed spend volume
pricing.notes: Irish company (Cork). Founded 2012. Raised $24M Series B (2021). Backed by Elephant Ventures, Molten Ventures, Silicon Valley Bank. Sourcing optimization specialist with Sourcing Bots as key differentiator — bots negotiate autonomously with suppliers for routine categories. Strong in logistics, transportation, and manufacturing sourcing. Acquired by SAP in 2024 — now part of SAP Business Network. Acquisition by SAP gives enterprise credibility but may affect standalone product direction.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for sourcing event management. OAuth2 client credentials auth. Enterprise documentation. Webhook for sourcing lifecycle events. SAP acquisition (2024) may affect API stability — monitor for SAP integration changes. Sourcing Bot configuration is the unique differentiator — requires procurement expertise to configure automation rules correctly.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Sourcing event reads fully idempotent. Bid reads idempotent. Award optimization results idempotent by event ID. Sourcing Bot configuration reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Acquired by SAP in 2024 — product direction and API stability may change post-acquisition
Sourcing Bots require careful configuration — automated negotiation has procurement risk if misconfigured
Enterprise annual contract required — significant investment
Integration with SAP Ariba (now parent company) may change from API to internal integration
Award optimization uses linear programming — results require procurement expertise to interpret

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR compliant. EU and US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. SAP acquisition brings SAP enterprise security standards. Sourcing bid data is highly confidential — must prevent premature disclosure of supplier bids. Sourcing Bot automation must be carefully audited for negotiation strategy leakage. Irish company (EU GDPR compliance by default).
